completed_slices.summary: Added a first-run onboarding section above the Library with workflow tour copy, three quick actions, import-flow focusing/opening behavior, responsive styling, and Playwright smoke coverage.
public_interfaces_changed: Homepage now exposes #getting-started onboarding section with Start with Two Sum, Import your own Kata, and Open Applied Algorithms Cursus actions.
acceptance_status: Homepage shows onboarding above Library with three quick actions.
Onboarding copy covers Run Samples vs Submit, Assessments, Cursus, and Self-checks/Checkpoints.
Quick actions target /problem/two-sum, existing import flow, and /cursus/applied-algorithms-coding-round.
Playwright smoke test verifies onboarding section, quick action links, and import action behavior.
No server execution, authentication, telemetry, or private branding introduced.
assumptions: Used the existing #import-user-kata and kataforge:open-user-kata-import flow for import onboarding.

integration_repair.summary: Repaired pnpm verification setup so fresh installs can run approved esbuild/sharp build scripts under pnpm 11, then verified all required checks pass.

findings.description: pnpm v11 ignored package.json pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies while workspace allowBuilds left esbuild/sharp as placeholders, causing fresh verification installs to fail. Set explicit workspace build approvals and removed the ignored package.json pnpm config.
